questionHtml:
A potential energy profile is shown for a reaction.

Which energy changes would a catalyst affect?


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: A potential energy profile is shown for a reaction. Which energy changes would a catalyst affect? A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
breadcrumbLabels: 1.1 Introduction to the particulate nature of matter and chemical change
